programme.title: Long Gone WIld
programme.desc: If you liked the documentary Blackfish, this film picks up where Blackfish left off.

programme.title: Liquid Edge Ep102
programme.desc: Liquid Edge leaps into canyon pools with the Deap Canyoning Team, captures a first waterfall descent with kayak superstar Steve Fisher, showcases surf cinematographer Larry Haynes, searches the world for secret surf spots via the film Planet Blow, and features an epic swell via Oakley’s Wave of the Winter.

programme.title: Journeys In Africa Ep206: Victoria Falls…The Smoke That Thunders
programme.desc: One of the 7 Natural Wonders of the World, Victoria Falls is an amazing spectacle that straddles the Zambia/Zimbabwe border. The force of the water is so intense that the water bouncing back creates a rainforest. Remarkably, the wildlife in the area is as abundant as the water going over the falls.

programme.title: The Surfing Lifestyle Ep104: In Search of Perfect Waves
programme.desc: A key component of The Surfing Lifestyle is to venture to lesser travelled parts of the world in search of perfect waves, and Dru Adler, Adam Bennetts and their surfboard shaper Daniel MacDonald, did exactly that in southern Sumatra where they found uncrowded perfection and adventure around every turn.

programme.title: The Blue Realm Ep110: The Ship Sinkers
programme.desc: Mothballed, de-commissioned naval vessels are toxic time-bombs, filled with PCB’s, asbestos, lead paint, oil and grease. Hundreds rust in dockyards around the world. What can be done with them? A team of Canadians has developed an innovative solution…they clean the ships...then sink them!

programme.title: Sportsman's Adventures: Kings of Texas
programme.desc: Captain Rick Murphy is on the troll for kingfish in Port Mansfield, Texas. Guiding him to the fish is Captain Chad Kinney from Texas Insider Fishing Report.

programme.title: Shark Dive TV Ep110: Bull Sharks in Cancun, Mexico + Sharks Electrosensory Systems
programme.desc: Shark Dive TV dives with Bull Sharks in Cancun, Mexico and analyzes shark's electrosensory systems.

programme.title: Liquid Edge Ep102
programme.desc: Liquid Edge leaps into canyon pools with the Deap Canyoning Team, captures a first waterfall descent with kayak superstar Steve Fisher, showcases surf cinematographer Larry Haynes, searches the world for secret surf spots via the film Planet Blow, and features an epic swell via Oakley’s Wave of the Winter.

programme.title: Journeys In Africa Ep206: Victoria Falls…The Smoke That Thunders
programme.desc: One of the 7 Natural Wonders of the World, Victoria Falls is an amazing spectacle that straddles the Zambia/Zimbabwe border. The force of the water is so intense that the water bouncing back creates a rainforest. Remarkably, the wildlife in the area is as abundant as the water going over the falls.

programme.title: The Black Crows - Episode 2: Yorgo Tloupas
programme.desc: In Episode 2, we meet Yorgo Tloupas, the graphic development manager and visual identity creator for Black Crows. Yorgo is a cosmopolitan artist, action-sports aficionado, cigarillo smoker, fixie pedaller, and cylinder head. He wears many hats. Above all, he is a great illuminator of oblong shapes.

programme.title: The Black Crows - Episode 3: Minna Riihimaki
programme.desc: In Episode 3, you will encounter a Crow from the early days, Minna Riihimaki. A native of northern Europe. A passionate and lively adventurer. With contagious joy, Minna fed the Black Crows DNA. When she’s not skiing, she’s also a dentist, which is cool.

programme.title: The Black Crows - Episode 4: Callum Pettit
programme.desc: In Episode 4, we meet Callum Pettit, a mountain calligrapher, in his Whistler hideout in the heart of British Columbia, Canada.

programme.title: Arc’teryx Presents: Here Goes
programme.desc: Before ‘Skier of the Year’ Sam Kuch drops into any line, he utters the mantra, “here goes.” What began as a superstitious habit has become the confidence booster he uses to face any task. Watch this high-caliber short film about skiing, focus, and execution.

programme.title: Live For This: Float
programme.desc: A film about snowboarders and skiers slashing snow-covered walls, chasing the feeling of weightlessness. We crave those moments when distractions fall away and we lock into mountain life. We dream of it. We study weather forecasts all season. We wake before sunrise. We hit the road in search of it.

programme.title: The Black Crows - Episode 5: Jose Lagarellos
programme.desc: In Episode 5, we meet Jose Lagarellos. He is a passionate big mountain skier. He is also the DJ and electronic events organizer behind the Chamonix Unlimited Festival. Like us, he loves original spaces and synthetic sounds. Watch now.

programme.title: The Black Crows - Episode 6: Bruno Compagnet Camille Jaccoux
programme.desc: In Episode 6, we meet Camille Jaccoux and Bruno Compagnet, the founders of Black Crows. In 2000, two pro skiers brought a new ski to life. Their sole aim was to make a ski that could adapt to the needs of big mountain skiing. Today, their products are used on every mountain range around the globe.

programme.title: The Black Crows - Episode 7: Hervé Picamelot
programme.desc: For Hervé Picamelot, winter is first and foremost about the road. Each weekend, he leaves his native village in Burgundy and his family’s ancient vines for his second home, Chamonix. A radical life choice, between two vastly different universes and their celestial aromas: skiing and wine.

programme.title: The Black Crows - Episode 8: Christina Lustenberger
programme.desc: In Episode 8, we meet Christina Lustenberger. This ex-alpine racer, turned ACMG ski guide possesses all the attributes of a prominent mountain skier: passion, drive and constant wonder. If you enjoy skiing adventures, this episode is not to be missed.

programme.title: Drawn From Here
programme.desc: Drawn From Here is an exploration of professional skier Eric Pollard's processes as an athlete, product designer, and artist. The film follows the influences he draws from and chronicles a pivotal injury Pollard endured during the winter of 2013. Named Powder Magazine's "Movie of the Year.”

programme.title: After The Sky Falls
programme.desc: "After The Sky Falls" captures the skiing of Eric Pollard, Chris Benchetler and Pep Fujas. Two years in the making, this film beautifully documents the Nimbus crew’s approach to skiing, their focus on fun and creativity, and their desire to inspire everyday skiers.

programme.title: Unraveling - Chris Benchetler
programme.desc: Progression means something different to everyone. To Chris Benchetler, progression means evolving as a professional skier, as an artist, and as a father. It means growth, unraveling expectations, and changes over time. It means simplicity, clarity, and freedom. Filmed by director Tyler Hamlet.

programme.title: The Black Crows - Episode 9: Kristoffer Turdell
programme.desc: In Episode 9, we encounter skier Kristoffer Turdell, two-time champion of the freeride world. Join us for this special Black Crows documentary about the animal from Gallivare, Sweden. Directed by Nikolai Schirmer.

programme.title: The Black Crows - Episode 10: Beau Fredlund
programme.desc: A yurt, 140 inhabitants in town, a door that opens on the northeast of Yellowstone National Park in Montana, a fireplace, a pair of skis, welcome to Beau's wild garden. a film by Nikolai Schirmer

programme.title: The Black Crows - Episode 11: The Jackson 9
programme.desc: Jackson Hole, Wyoming is home to some of the most epic skiing in North America. It is also home to a bunch of bohemian skiers nicknamed the Jackson 9. In Episode 11, we kick off Part One of our documentary series dedicated to these hobo shredders and beautiful souls. Directed by Nicolai Schirmer.

programme.title: The Black Crows - Episode 12: Nikolai Schirmer
programme.desc: He is tall, handsome, smart, sensitive and on fire while on skis. Nikolai Schirmer, skier, bohemian-movie-maker, reveals himself in this black doc where his meandering path unfolds. An itinerary full of waves and mountains where we discover a man whose heart has progressively tuned in to the rhythm of nature.

programme.title: Snowflake
programme.desc: Witness the joys and wonders of nature through the eyes of Snowflake, an eccentric Swiss skier with a life philosophy just as beautiful and perfectly unique as his namesake.

programme.title: Arc’teryx Presents: Motherload
programme.desc: The hardest part of any adventure is getting out the door. Planning is tedious. Packing is time consuming. Once on-hill, everything falls into place. Follow pro skiers Izzy Lynch and Tessa Treadway as they carry the load of life changing events and the love of their children into the mountains.

programme.title: The Ghost Ski Resorts - Fortress
programme.desc: Deep in the Rockies stands Fortress Mountain. From the late 1960s through the 1980s, this landmark ski area buzzed with activity. Today, it is a quiet thing of abandoned beauty. Skiers Mark Abma and Callum Pettit explore the past and ponder the future of this once iconic Alberta destination.

programme.title: The Ghost Ski Resorts - Ski Rio
programme.desc: In January 2000, Ski Rio closed one night. The resort has remained dormant ever since. It’s no stretch to compare Ski Rio’s snow covered lodgings to the Overlook Hotel in the cult classic thriller The Shining. Just like in the film, the innkeeper Joe Musich admits his job can get a little spooky.

programme.title: The Black Crows - Episode 13: The Groomer Crow - Bernie Rosow
programme.desc: Do you despise your office job? If so, Episode 13 offers the truth, the way, and the light. Bernie Rosow could neither consider a life without skiing, nor skiing without the freedom of skiing. Now a snowcat operator, his night shift allows him to solve the equation and to freeski every day, freely.

programme.title: The Black Crows - Episode 14: Tony Deano - Ski Bums Forever
programme.desc: In Episode 14, we honor our friends Tony Stadler and Deano Dacas. Before Black Crows was ever conceived, we were skiing for years with these two. And we will keep on skiing with them, whatever happens. We are the ski bum crows brotherhood forever.

programme.title: The Black Crows - Episode 15: Gabriella Palko
programme.desc: Gabby Palko is living what many skiers would call a dream life. From her sailboat in the Port of Valdez, she is able to ski the Alaskan mountains as often as she likes. In this emotional documentary, she connects the dots between the two parts of her life, broken by the long illness of her father.

programme.title: The Black Crows Presents: Wavy 2
programme.desc: After filming WAVY, director Nikolai Schirmer promised himself that he would never set foot on a ship again. Find out how he ended up off the coast of Svalbard with an excited rookie, a contemptuous captain, and a reformed drug addict, in this thrilling and often comical ski adventure documentary.

programme.title: Tomorrow Will Be Better

programme.title: California Republic
programme.desc: No other place offers such endless freedom while fueling surfing's evolution. California's blue skies, green waters, and landscapes inspire millions worldwide and shape global culture.

programme.title: Speed Catamarans GC32 - Episode 5
programme.desc: For its fifth event of the sixth season, the ultra-high performance one-design catamarans were invited to visit Muscat for the final event of the 2019 GC32 Racing Tour, the GC32 Oman Cup. The event, held in Muscat, has been jointly organized by Oman Sail and the host venue partners EFG Private Banking as well as fragrance brand Amouj and the Sultanate of Oman Ministry of Tourism. The Oman Cup was the final of the 2019 GC32 Racing Tour and will decide this year’s overall podium places. Unquestionably the big fight was for top spot between the local heroes Oman Air and Ernesto Bertarelli’s World Champions Alinghi.With so many teams close on the leader board, there was the potential for some crucial match races amongst the fleet.

programme.title: Les Voiles de Saint Tropez - Episode 1
programme.desc: [object Object]

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 9
programme.desc: Welcome back sailors! Today we are indulging in the most fragrant gardens of the islands of Cres and Losinj where the beauty of nature is next level. These islands are also known as the favourite place for many boaters who like to enjoy beautiful beaches and top restaurants. Let's dive in!

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 10
programme.desc: In this episode we are in the Opatija Riviera - the jewel box of the Northern Adriatic. With its enchanting architecture and romantic seaside promenades, it instantly takes us back to glorious summer days of the historical elite and royals. Now, let us take you here in Sail-Ho Croatia!

programme.title: Un día en...Salón Internacional Náutico de Barcelona - Salón Internacional Barcelona - Ep5
programme.desc: [object Object]

programme.title: Cannes Yachting Festival - Episode 1
programme.desc: Since 1977, the Cannes Yachting Festival takes place every September in elegant, luxurious surroundings in the sparkling bay of Cannes. We are ready for the 2018 edition that promises the latest trends in the nautical industry. Jump on board the 2018 Cannes Yachting Festival to discover superyachts, equipment, regattas, competitions and more.

programme.title: Kite Masters - Episode 3
programme.desc: In this episode, we are travelling to the other side of the world for the second act of the Kitefoil World Series to see if Toni Vodisek can keep up with his great performance beating and second fleet after Gizzeria. The 19-year-old Slovenian has secured his first regatta on the professional kite racing circuit. Will he beat the lead from Axel Mazella?

programme.title: Kite Masters - Episode 4
programme.desc: In this episode we are taking a domestic flight to the east coast of Fujian Province, Pingtan, for the Kitefoil World Series. The long sandy beaches and good weather conditions are placing Pingtan second most touristic island of China and if you combine its good winds, Pingtan makes perfect venue for Kiteboarding!

programme.title: Surfer's Blood
programme.desc: Renowned surf photographer and filmmaker Patrick Trefz explores the essence of the sport he loves by profiling those who inspire him. Surfers' Blood tells the universal story of true individuals that share deep bloodlines connected to the sea.From wooden fishing boats in the Basque Country coast with oar and surfboard shaper Patxi Oliden to the metropolis of San Francisco and the eccentric computer shapes of Apple fame designer Thomas Meyerhoffer, unique people unite by a deep connection to the sea.Watch it on Nautical Channel.

programme.desc: Set on a tropical island in Thailand, the strange plight of a beleaguered chef who, while romancing a mysterious woman, discovers the diabolical Zen of cooking. Following a near death escape, he returns to Montreal and falls hard for the woman of his life who unfortunately craves only his cooking but not his loving. Worse still, strange things surfacing around him indicate that his journey to the Far East has deep, divine implications. The stage is set for him to take the 1st bite of true love and end the cycle of suffering for all involved.

programme.title: CSI2* Maeza Grand Prix - Grand Prix
programme.desc: Welcome to the Yeguada Finca Maeza, the international host for this incredible competition. In Asturias and surrounded by the most characteristic landscape, it wraps in a captivating silence. For two weekends the Maeza family welcomes riders and horses from all over the world openly. Who has what it takes to win? Find out now the highlights of the competition at Maeza, on HorseTV.

programme.title: Copa Lazio
programme.desc: The Lazio Cup is a two-heat category on four courses of different heights: 115, 120, 125 and 140. With 17 teams at the start, it is an awaited event in the show jumping Italian agenda. Celebrated in "La Macchiarella" Equestrian Village, covering an area of 9 hectares, we can see riders, horses, ponies and spectators assemble to watch this exciting competition. Enjoy the best moments of the 2021 Lazio Cup!

programme.title: Longines Global Champions Tour - Episode 4 - Valkenswaard
programme.desc: Valkenswaard has welcomed international riders for the fourth leg of the Longines Global Champions Tour this year. Competition is only just beginning but riders have already proven to give their all in The Netherlands. Excitement, excellence and the best show jumping performances are about to take place in the LGCT.

programme.title: Global Champions League - Episode 4 - Valkenswaard
programme.desc: Shanghai Swans has once again taken the victory away from Valkenswaard United during the previous leg. However, now we are in the terrain of Valkenswaard United, and they are not going to give up so easily at home. Will they be able to coordinate to ensure their victory or will some other team win the Valkenswaard leg of the Global Champions League? Find out the best moments of the competition.

programme.title: Longines Global Champions Tour - Episode 4 - Madrid
programme.desc: We move to Madrid, the city that hosts the fourth leg of one of the most challenging and demanding show jumping competitions in the world: the Longines Global Champions Tour. With a height over 1.50m, precision is key in order to top the podium. Relive the best moments of the 2022 edition of the LGCT in Madrid.

programme.title: Global Champions League - Episode 4 - Madrid
programme.desc: Madrid, Spain. The weather forecasts a sunny day with no clouds. An eager audience sits down with excitement waiting for the jump off to begin and the riders get ready to give their all in the fourth leg of the 2022 Global Champions Tour. However, the score could take a turn any time, as the top riders are teaming up for their golden ticket in the Playoffs. Relive the best moments of the fourth leg of the 2022 GCL in Madrid.

programme.title: Listen to Classic Rock

programme.title: Expediente 53 2.0
programme.desc: Mientras el líder de los delincuentes de la ciudad, Jack se reúne con el demonio Lilly alias Abal en un antro/table para matar y tomar las almas de sus víctimas. El FBI pide ayuda de unos sacerdotes solo que el hermano menor de Jack es poseído por Abal y ahora Jack tendrá que tomar una de las decisiones más difíciles de su vida.

programme.title: Buenas Noches, Dijo La Señorita Pájaro
programme.desc: Un adulterio, un secreto familiar, un asesino en serie. Una historia fabricada con estructura de muñecas rusas y con ritmo de montañas rusas.

programme.title: El Director (Las Siete Madres de Edipo)
programme.desc: Dos jóvenes estudiantes de actuación siguiendo sus sueños se embarcan en un proyecto para filmar una película de terror que no resulta ser lo que esperaban.

programme.title: Cartero
programme.desc: Hernán Sosa es un joven tímido que viene del interior a la ciudad. En su pueblo siempre estuvo enamorado de una chica inalcanzable, Yanina. Hernán consigue trabajo en el correo. Durante el reparto, Hernán descubre que Yanina se encuentra en la ciudad, en la zona de su reparto. En consecuencia, comienza a desplegar sus nuevos conocimientos de cartero para llegar hasta ella. Pero a medida que se acerca, descubre que unos viejos carteros están organizando un robo en el mismo edificio donde trabaja Yanina. Envalentonado por la fuerza del amor, Hernán se enfrentará a los peligros que rodean a Yanina para llegar a declararle lo que siente.

programme.title: [object Object]
programme.desc: [object Object]

programme.title: Vidas Violentas
programme.desc: integrada por seis cortometrajes escritos y dirigidos por seis de los más connotados directores mexicanos, la película fue realizada y dirigida para concientizar y reducir la violencia de género, el acoso escolar en las escuelas y la violencia doméstica. Proviene de una iniciativa del gobierno en el marco de la campaña basta no violencia

programme.title: Despertar El Polvo
programme.desc: Es la historia de un hombre que ha sufrido las desgracias de vivir una vida trasgredida por la delincuencia y corrupción, el barrio de Iztapalapa es el escenario donde vaga por las calles, invisible, ignorado y solitario, sumido en su miseria. Un evento desafortunado mueve el instinto protector de Chano que intenta regresar al mundo del crimen para lograr sacar a su ahijado de la cárcel.

programme.title: The Amazing Mr. X
programme.desc: Una viuda en duelo es seducida por un espiritista que afirma poder contactar a su difunto esposo, pero nada es lo que parece.

programme.title: A Bucket of Blood
programme.desc: Un camarero de un café beatnik se convierte en un artista asesino para alimentar su nueva fama.

programme.title: Abilene Town
programme.desc: Un sheriff intenta detener los conflictos entre colonos en el Oeste tras la Guerra Civil.

programme.title: Detour
programme.desc: El viaje de un autoestopista hacia California se convierte en una pesadilla de muerte, chantaje y encuentros fatales con una despiadada femme fatale.
